title: Streaming Bitrate Calculator 2026 | Hacé Cuentas
description: Calculate recommended bitrate for streaming in HD, 4K, and more. Find optimal upload speeds for YouTube, Twitch, and Kick.
intro: Technical calculations in IT and software development are critical: latency, bandwidth, SLA uptime, cloud costs, algorithm complexity. Getting your bitrate calculation right from the start prevents infrastructure over-provisioning. Use this calculator to find the recommended bitrate for your streaming resolution. Our values are current as of 2026 and reviewed regularly.
keyTakeaway: Formula: **Mbps by pixels**. Direct application with your input values. Get the recommended bitrate for your streaming resolution.
useCases: Technical calculations related to streaming bitrate
explanation:
Technical calculators for IT professionals are essential: latency, storage, SLA uptime, cloud costs. Decisions that scale.

## How it's calculated

Recommended bitrate by resolution.

This calculator applies the formula with your input values while checking typical ranges and alerting you when values fall outside reasonable bounds.

## Final Notes

This calculation is a reference guide only. For critical decisions (financial, medical, legal), consult a specialized professional. Values are current as of 2026 and reviewed regularly.

faq.q: What bitrate should I use for 720p streaming?
What bitrate do I need for 1080p 60fps streaming?
How much bitrate is needed for 4K streaming?
How much upload speed do I need for streaming?
faq.a: Plan for 1.5x your bitrate to account for protocol overhead.

faq.q: What's the difference between H.264 and H.265 for streaming?
faq.a: H.265 offers better compression, but fewer streaming software options support it.

faq.q: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes, all our calculators are free and require no registration.

sources.name: NIST — National Institute of Standards and Technology

dataUpdate.notes: Fixed formula, no external data updates required
